title: WAHA trigger node not found in n8n
symptom: The user cannot find the WAHA trigger node in their n8n instance, leading to confusion while following a tutorial.
applies_when: Trying to follow a tutorial that requires the WAHA node
root_cause: The WAHA trigger node is a community node and is not included by default in n8n installations. Users need to manually install it to use it in their workflows.
fix_steps: Paste the full name of the community node '@devlikeapro/n8n-nodes-waha'
agent_instruction: Install the WAHA trigger node from the Community Nodes section in n8n settings.
